_doc: Config for scripts/check-designer-boundary.mjs (B3a designer boundary gate, DDR-2026-06-18). surfaceRoots are scanned for direct child dirs whose name matches *-designer / *-designer-sdk; expectedSurfaces are governed designer surfaces whose dir name does not follow that convention (must still carry a designer.family.json). allowlist = name-matched dirs that are intentionally NOT governed surfaces, each with a reason.

allowlist.web-admin/app/plugins/core-designer/comp: placeholder stub (FlowDesigner.tsx renders a 'TODO 替换为真实的流程设计器实现' panel); not a governed surface. Remove from allowlist when a real flow surface lands here.
